evals.prompt: Run /quick-fix fix the typo in the homepage hero section title
evals.expected_output: Creates GitHub Issue, branches from develop, fixes the typo with tests, merges back to develop, updates .state.md
expectations: Creates a GitHub Issue via gh issue create --label type:quickfix
Creates a branch from develop with naming pattern fix/<issue-number>-<description>
Implements the fix with at least one test
Runs the test suite before merging
Creates PR via gh pr create --base develop and merges the fix branch back to develop
Commit message follows Conventional Commits format
Commit message does NOT include Co-Authored-By or AI attribution

evals.expected_output: Asks the user what needs to be fixed before proceeding
expectations: Does not create an issue without a description
Asks the user to describe the issue
Does not branch or start implementing without user input
